records.question: Which teams named Columbus Crew have a player called Chung Hong (717) who played exactly 1 year in 2011 with singles, doubles, and total win-loss all 0–0, played as a Midfielder in the match season, and had a draft pick number of at least 18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.doubles_wl = '0–0' AND player.player = 'Chung Hong (717)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–0' AND match_season.position = 'Midfielder' AND player.years_played = '1 (2011)' AND match_season.draft_pick_number >= 18 AND player.total_wl = '0–0' AND team.name = 'Columbus Crew'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join player on player.Team = team.Team_id join match_season on match_season.Team = team.Team_id and match_season.Player = player.Player where lower(team.Name) like '%columbus crew%' and lower(player.Player) like '%chung hong (717)%' and player.Years_Played = 1 and match_season.Season = 2011 and player.Total_WL = '0-0' and player.Singles_WL = '0-0' and player.Doubles_WL = '0-0' and lower(match_season.Position) like '%midfielder%' and match_season.Draft_Pick_Number >= 18 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join team, player, and match_season tables to filter for teams named Columbus Crew, with a player named Chung Hong (717) who played exactly 1 year in 2011, had all win-loss records as 0–0, played as a Midfielder, and had a draft pick number of at least 18.

records.question: Which teams named Evalyn Feil have players and participated in a match season where the college is UNLV?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE team.name = 'Evalyn Feil' AND match_season.college = 'UNLV'
records.pred_sql: select distinct team.team_id from team join player on player.team = team.team_id join match_season on match_season.team = team.team_id where lower(team.name) like '%evalyn feil%' and lower(match_season.college) like '%unlv%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need teams named 'Evalyn Feil' that have at least one player and have participated in a match season where the college is 'UNLV'. We'll join team, player, and match_season, filter by team name and college, and select distinct team IDs.

records.question: Which teams had forwards from Concordia College drafted at pick number 13 or fewer in the 2001 MLS SuperDraft?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
WHERE match_season.draft_class = '2001 MLS SuperDraft' AND match_season.position = 'Forward' AND match_season.draft_pick_number <= 13 AND match_season.college = 'Concordia College'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from match_season join team on match_season.Team = team.Team_id where lower(match_season.Position) like '%forward%' and lower(match_season.College) like '%concordia college%' and match_season.Draft_Pick_Number <= 13 and lower(match_season.Draft_Class) like '%2001 mls superdraft%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find teams with players who played the forward position, attended Concordia College, were drafted at pick number 13 or fewer, and were drafted in the 2001 MLS SuperDraft. We'll filter match_season for these criteria and join with team to get the team_id.

records.question: What teams have played in countries where the capital is Washington?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.capital = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on match_season.Team = team.team_id join country on match_season.Country = country.Country_id where lower(country.Capital) like '%washington%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find teams that have played matches in countries whose capital is Washington by joining match_season, country, and team tables.

SELECT team.team_id FROM team

JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE country.official_native_language = 'English Manx' AND match_season.college = 'Duke' AND team.name = 'Miami Fusion' AND country.country_name = 'Isle of Man'

records.question: Which teams named Berneice Hand include the player Bae Nam-Ju who played exactly 2 years (1988, 1990) with singles wins-losses of 0–2, doubles wins-losses of 1–1, and total wins-losses of 1–3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN player ON team.team_id = player.team
WHERE player.years_played = '2 (1988, 1990)' AND player.singles_wl = '0–2' AND team.name = 'Berneice Hand' AND player.player = 'Bae Nam-Ju' AND player.total_wl = '1–3' AND player.doubles_wl = '1–1'

records.question: What teams named Columbus Crew have a Midfielder drafted exactly 18th in the 1996 MLS College Draft from Florida International, where the player's country has English as the official native language and its capital is Washington?

SELECT team.team_id FROM team
JOIN match_season ON team.team_id = match_season.team
JOIN country ON match_season.country = country.country_id
WHERE match_season.draft_pick_number = 18 AND match_season.position = 'Midfielder' AND team.name = 'Columbus Crew' AND country.official_native_language = 'English' AND match_season.college = 'Florida International' AND country.capital = 'Washington' AND match_season.draft_class = '1996 MLS College Draft'
records.pred_sql: select team.team_id from team join match_season on match_season.Team = team.team_id join country on match_season.Country = country.Country_id join player on player.Team = team.team_id and player.Player = match_season.Player where lower(team.Name) like '%columbus crew%' and lower(match_season.Position) like '%midfielder%' and match_season.Draft_Pick_Number = 18 and lower(match_season.Draft_Class) like '%1996 mls college draft%' and lower(match_season.College) like '%florida international%' and lower(country.Official_native_language) like '%english%' and lower(country.Capital) like '%washington%' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to join team, match_season, country, and player tables to filter by team name, position, draft pick, draft class, college, country language, and capital, ensuring all conditions are met.
